notes: WebFetch returned HTTP 403 for all sites — this is a sandbox networking restriction on the WebFetch proxy, NOT confirmed site outages. SSL certificate checks via Bash/openssl succeeded for all 8 sites (server TLS handshake = indirect evidence sites are serving traffic). All SSL certs expire 2026-06-13 (30 days from check date; threshold is <30 days so no SSL warning triggered). Uptime status recorded as check_failed to distinguish from confirmed outages.
